name: Military Hegemony
description: A rigid coalition built upon overwhelming preemptive force.

name: Defensive Containment
description: A mutual defense pact designed specifically to block the expansion of a threatening neighbor.

name: Revolutionary Vanguard
description: An aggressive ideological bloc dedicated to exporting their revolution via proxy support.

name: Corporate Syndicate
perks: Immune to Trade Embargoes from Non-Members
description: An alliance of market convenience designed to corner galactic trade networks.

name: Liberation Front
perks: Rebel factions in rival states receive +50% passive strength
description: A coalition sworn to the total eradication of tyrannical rule across the stars.

name: Pragmatic Alliance
description: A standard realpolitik alliance of convenience with no strict ideological overtones.
